unitEffects.name: Battle-Fatigue
unitEffects.description: When this unit attacks, after Convert Attack Surges, opponent may remove up to X dice showing hit results. Stackable.

unitEffects.name: Battle-Shaken
unitEffects.description: After Rally, if Suppression > Courage, suffer 1 Wound. Vehicles/single-miniature: 1 Wound at start of first Activation Phase instead.

unitEffects.name: Downtrodden
unitEffects.description: When added to an army, point cost +15 per instance. Stackable.

unitEffects.name: Story Arc Setback
unitEffects.description: Gain 1 Experience, then apply the Setback from your Theater of War.

unitEffects.name: Captious Command
unitEffects.description: At end of game, opponent does not name a Most Feared Rival. Resolves after 2 games.

unitEffects.name: Unsure
unitEffects.description: When nominated as Commander, roll 1 red defense. On block, allied units issued an Order with a Command Card this round gain 1 Suppression. Resolves after 2 games.

unitEffects.name: Tunnel Vision
unitEffects.description: No SP from Agendas; units cannot gain XP from active Agenda. If Agenda not progressed, Paragon makes Casualty Check. Resolves after 2 games.

unitEffects.name: Story Arc Defining Trait
unitEffects.description: Gain 1 Experience, then apply Theater of War Defining Trait.

unitEffects.name: Disgraced
unitEffects.description: Allied units may only use this unit's Courage for Panic within Range 2 instead of 3.

unitEffects.name: Faulty Equipment
unitEffects.description: At start of first Command Phase, randomize Order tokens and draw 2; matching units gain Faulty Equipment tokens.

unitEffects.name: Insecure
unitEffects.description: If this unit would issue an Order to itself, roll a red defense die. On a block, it cannot issue that Order to itself and must issue it to another unit instead, if able.

unitEffects.name: Hunted
unitEffects.description: Narrative status from Liberate the System Turning Point loss.

unitEffects.name: Resilient
unitEffects.description: On Casualty Check with 2+ black dice, may reroll 1 die.

unitEffects.name: Veteran Leader
unitEffects.description: Gains Inspire 2.

unitEffects.name: Special Munitions
unitEffects.description: Once per game when attacking, chosen Attack Pool gains Anti-Materiel 2 and Impact 1.

unitEffects.name: Well-Stocked
unitEffects.description: Special Munitions once per Round instead of once per Game.

unitEffects.name: One in a Million
unitEffects.description: Once per game when attacking, upgrade 2 dice in chosen Attack Pool.

unitEffects.name: Sterner Stuff
unitEffects.description: Once per game when removing last miniature from Wounds, roll black attack; on surge/crit survive with 1 Wound.

unitEffects.name: Strongpoint Expertise
unitEffects.description: Gains Prepared Position. In allied Territory, Cover Pool rolls red defense instead of white.

unitEffects.name: Marksmanship Badge
unitEffects.description: Gains Precise 1.

unitEffects.name: Harsh Environments Gear
unitEffects.description: Gains Unhindered.

unitEffects.name: Advanced Drill
unitEffects.description: Gains a Training upgrade slot.

unitEffects.name: Forward Patrol
unitEffects.description: Gains a Comms upgrade slot.

unitEffects.name: Extra Equipment
unitEffects.description: Gains a Gear and a Grenades upgrade slot.

unitEffects.name: Field Modifications
unitEffects.description: Wound Threshold +1 and Resilience +1 if it has Resilience.

unitEffects.name: Flexible Response
unitEffects.description: Gains a Heavy Weapon slot and Flexible Response X.

unitEffects.name: Recon Badge
unitEffects.description: Gains Scout 1.

unitEffects.name: Assault Badge
unitEffects.description: Gains Tactical 1.

unitEffects.name: Personal Shields
unitEffects.description: Gains Recharge 1 and Shielded 1.

unitEffects.name: Feats of Valor
unitEffects.description: Courage +1.

unitEffects.name: Self-Sufficient
unitEffects.description: Gains Independent: Aim 1 or Dodge 1.

unitEffects.name: Fearsome
unitEffects.description: Gains Demoralize 1.

unitEffects.name: Urban Assault Experts
unitEffects.description: When attacking a unit with Cover from Obscured terrain, Sharpshooter 1.

unitEffects.name: Expert Pilot
unitEffects.description: Gains Nimble and Outmaneuver.

unitEffects.name: Dedicated to the Cause
unitEffects.description: On Casualty Check with 2+ black dice, reroll up to 2.

unitEffects.name: Lucky Shot
unitEffects.description: One in a Million once per Round instead of once per Game.

unitEffects.name: Implacable
unitEffects.description: Sterner Stuff once per Round instead of once per Game.

unitEffects.name: Headhunters
unitEffects.description: Gains Bounty.

unitEffects.name: Veteran Gunners
unitEffects.description: Gains Arsenal 1.

unitEffects.name: Born to Lead
unitEffects.description: Gains One Step Ahead.

acts.name: Bring Peace to the Galaxy
acts.narrative: Under the Emperor's benevolent rule, crush malcontents who sow discord. Truth and unity — For the Empire!

objectives.name: Keep Them in Line
objectives.description: Token when you cause Panic. Post-game: 2+ tokens → progress once; 3+ → again. Complete at 3 progress.
objectives.rewardDescription: Draw Order tokens equal to progressions; matching units gain 2 XP each.

objectives.name: Gather Intelligence
objectives.description: Trooper Listening Device actions. End Phase token if 2+ allied devices. 3+/4+ tokens progress. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: gain 2 SP OR unit +2 XP and remove 1 Setback.

objectives.name: Persons of Interest
objectives.description: Roll black attack at setup for target rank. Tokens on kills. 5+/7+ progress. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: choose unit; remove all Setbacks or +2 XP if none.

climax.name: Wipe Them Out
climax.briefing: Eliminate evacuation resistance and secure the area.
climax.specialRules: 5 Defensive Positions in Red Territory; 1 Evacuation Point Contested.
climax.secondaryObjectives: Transports / capture fleeing units. 3+ secondary VP → 2 SP.
climax.advantages: Blue free moves per removed Defensive Position. Red Prepared Position + Cover near positions.
climax.victoryRewardDescription: 3 units: +1 XP or clear Setbacks. Paragon may gain Compel or Strategize 1; clear Disgraced.
climax.lossRewardDescription: Roll 5 red defense; per Block: unit +2 XP or remove 1 Setback. Paragon gains Disgraced.

unitEffects.name: Failure Is Not an Option
unitEffects.description: This unit gains Ruthless.

unitEffects.name: Flat Footed
unitEffects.description: Each Round at start of Activation Phase, if opponent played fewer pips, this unit gains 1 Suppression. Second instance before removal → casualty.

unitEffects.name: Conspicuous
unitEffects.description: Gains Advanced Targeting: Commander and Operative Trooper 1. Resolves after 2 games.

acts.name: Liberate the System
acts.narrative: A community suffers under occupation. Diverted resources, fear, and silence — if you don't fight, no one will.

objectives.name: Midnight Strikes
objectives.description: Token when defeating facedown-Order enemies. 2+/3+ progress. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Order-token draw: matching units +2 XP per progression.

objectives.name: Small Victories
objectives.description: Token when scoring Secondary VP. 3+ tokens progress; if lost, progress again. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: 1 SP OR unit +1 XP (once per unit).

objectives.name: On the Run
objectives.description: Token when you gain Priority. 2+/3+ progress. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: clear all Setbacks on a unit or +2 XP if none.

climax.name: The Big One
climax.briefing: Strike the outpost, disrupt operations, mobilize cells.
climax.specialRules: 5 Supply Stockpiles Contested; 1 Command Center in Red.
climax.secondaryObjectives: Holorecorder Identify the Leaders. SP/XP bonuses apply.
climax.advantages: Blue Paragon Rally aura. Red Prepared Position on half of Troopers.
climax.victoryRewardDescription: 3 units XP/clear Setbacks. Paragon Uncanny Luck 1 or One Step Ahead; clear Hunted.
climax.lossRewardDescription: 5 red defense; per Blank: unit +2 XP or remove Setback. Paragon gains Hunted.

unitEffects.name: Hopeful
unitEffects.description: Courage +1 (Vehicles: Resilience +1; if Resilience ≥ Wounds, Resilience becomes "-").

unitEffects.name: Compromised
unitEffects.description: Cannot Backup or Guardian. Second instance → casualty.

unitEffects.name: Weight of Responsibility
unitEffects.description: When issuing Orders without self-Order, ordered allies gain Suppression. Resolves after 2 games.

acts.name: Peacekeeping Mission
acts.narrative: Repel invaders and deliver relief. Establish a forward base; reinforcements will fortify the system. For the Republic!

objectives.name: Daring Defense
objectives.description: Mark ally + POI; tokens for contesting. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Chosen unit +2 XP or clear Setbacks. Cheat death: casualty → +2 XP + Setback instead.

objectives.name: Concentrated Efforts
objectives.description: 3+ Secondary VP → progress; if more than opponent, progress again. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: 2 SP per progression; +1 SP if won.

objectives.name: Against All Odds
objectives.description: End of Round token if opponent has more defeated. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Order-token draw: matching units +2 XP.

climax.name: The Hammer Falls
climax.briefing: Protect civilians; final assault with orbital bombardment.
climax.specialRules: 5 Defense Cannons; 3 Civilians. Blue rolls for bonus VP.
climax.secondaryObjectives: Rescue Civilians CLAIM action. 3+ secondary VP → 2 SP.
climax.victoryRewardDescription: 3 units XP/clear Setbacks. Paragon Danger Sense 1 or Quick Thinking; clear Insecure.
climax.lossRewardDescription: 5 red defense; per Blank: unit +2 XP or remove Setback. Paragon gains Insecure.

unitEffects.name: Unity
unitEffects.description: While 1+ other Clone Trooper within Range 1, Courage +1.

unitEffects.name: War Weary
unitEffects.description: On Casualty Check: may add 1 black die, or must reroll blanks.

unitEffects.name: Selfless Warden
unitEffects.description: Gains Inspire 2. At Aid Requests start, roll 3 white defense; lose 1 SP per block/surge. Resolves after 2 games.

acts.name: Root Out the Corruption
acts.narrative: A Republic system calls for Separatist aid against graft. Prove malfeasance and expand the Alliance.

objectives.name: Investigate Corruption
objectives.description: End Phase token if Trooper within Range 1 of Contested POI. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Order-token draw: matching units +2 XP.

objectives.name: Show of Strength
objectives.description: Token when Commander/Operative/SF defeats enemy. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: 2 SP OR defeated ally +1 XP.

objectives.name: The Long Game
objectives.description: Token when opponent gains Priority. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: clear Setbacks or +2 XP if none.

climax.name: Caught in the Act
climax.briefing: Investigate corruption; protect or destroy caches.
climax.specialRules: 6 Material Caches; token banking on caches; bombs for Red.
climax.advantages: Blue self-Order once; Red Commander suppression→orders/moves.
climax.victoryRewardDescription: 3 units XP/clear Setbacks. Paragon Strategize 1 or Guidance: Droid Trooper; clear Faulty Equipment.
climax.lossRewardDescription: 5 red defense; per Block: unit +2 XP or remove Setback. Paragon gains Faulty Equipment.

unitEffects.name: Well Supplied
unitEffects.description: Gains Reliable 1.

unitEffects.name: Scrambled
unitEffects.description: Droids can be Suppressed; non-droids Rally −1 die; damaged vehicles skip white defense / −1 action. Second instance → casualty.

unitEffects.name: Embittered
unitEffects.description: Allied defeat within Range 3 → +2 Suppression. Attack pool + white dice equal to Suppression. Resolves after 2 games.

acts.name: The Weekend War
acts.narrative: A remote system's treasure is accessible for days. Race rivals through stellar hazards to claim it.

objectives.name: Survey Landscape
objectives.description: Place Survey Scanners. 3+/5+ scanners → progress. Complete at 2.
objectives.rewardDescription: 1 SP per progression; if won, unit remove Setback +1 XP.

objectives.name: Search for Treasure
objectives.description: SEARCH action + red defense for Advantage tokens. Complete at 2.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: clear Setbacks or +2 XP. If won, Combat Potential +100.

objectives.name: Beat Them to the Punch
objectives.description: Tokens from contested kills / securing Contested POIs. Complete at 2.
objectives.rewardDescription: Order-token draw: matching units +1 XP and remove 1 Setback.

climax.name: Running Out of Time
climax.briefing: Seize treasure and stash it in cargo before time runs out.
climax.specialRules: Stockpiles with Suppression; Seize/Stash/Grab the Goods.
climax.secondaryObjectives: Treasure and cargo scoring as on card.
climax.advantages: Scout 1 Troopers; Red Prepared Position; Blue Infiltrate.
climax.victoryRewardDescription: 3 units XP/clear Setbacks. Paragon Eyes on the Prize: Agile 1 or Tactical 1.
climax.lossRewardDescription: 5 red defense; per Block: unit +2 XP or remove Setback. Paragon gains On the Back Foot.

unitEffects.name: Rapid Response
unitEffects.description: SF/Commander: Cunning. Otherwise: Scout 1.

unitEffects.name: Behind Schedule
unitEffects.description: After Command Cards revealed, if fewer pips: +2 Suppression and +2 Observation.

unitEffects.name: On the Back Foot
unitEffects.description: Once per game opponent may claim Priority. Resolves after 2 games.

acts.name: Birth of a Legend
acts.narrative: Every legend begins somewhere. Set out, gather followers, and etch your name among the stars.

objectives.name: Martial Prowess
objectives.description: Paragon kills → progress; if Commander/Operative among them, again. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: 1 SP per progression; if Paragon not defeated, +1 XP and may remove Setback.

objectives.name: Glorious Charge
objectives.description: End Phase token if Paragon contests/holds Objective. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Per progression: clear Setbacks or +1 XP; Paragon +1 XP if no Setbacks.

objectives.name: Protect Your Allies
objectives.description: You choose 1 non-Paragon; opponent chooses 2. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Survivors +1 XP and remove Setback; if none defeated: +2 SP and Paragon +2 XP.

climax.name: Seize Your Destiny
climax.briefing: Claim landmarks and face rivals on the dueling ground.
climax.specialRules: Landmarks Range 2 contest; Dueling Ground for Commander/Operative.
climax.secondaryObjectives: Dueling Ground VP; Infiltrate corps advantages.
climax.victoryRewardDescription: 3 units XP/clear Setbacks. Paragon becomes Lauded (2 High Commendations).
climax.lossRewardDescription: 5 red defense; per Surge: unit +2 XP or remove Setback. Paragon gains Disillusioned.

unitEffects.name: Legendary
unitEffects.description: Start of Activation: Aim or Dodge; remove 1 Suppression from ally within Range 2.

unitEffects.name: Losing Faith
unitEffects.description: During Remove Token, if within Range 2 of Paragon, remove 1 fewer Suppression.

unitEffects.name: Disillusioned
unitEffects.description: Cannot include this unit's Command Cards; cannot be issued Orders. Resolves after 2 games.

acts.name: A Pirate's Life
acts.narrative: War is cover for plunder. Why should the rich get richer when you can just get rich?

objectives.name: Salvage Materiel
objectives.description: Tokens when enemy dies within Range 1 (+2 if Armor). Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: 1 SP and unit +1 XP per progression.

objectives.name: Loot and Plunder!
objectives.description: Trooper Loot for Plunder. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Plunder units +1 XP; 1 SP per progression.

objectives.name: Discover Valuables
objectives.description: Mark terrain; SEARCH FOR TREASURE rolls 3 black attack. Complete at 3.
objectives.rewardDescription: Each progression: roll 2 red defense — surge → unit +1 XP; blank/block → +1 SP.

climax.name: Golden Opportunity
climax.briefing: Steal military equipment and load it onto your cargo ramp.
climax.specialRules: 4 Military Equipment + Cargo Ramp; move/remove scoring.
climax.secondaryObjectives: ESCAPE for Blue; defeat Blue units for Red.
climax.advantages: Blue center deploy Incognito; Red token bank.
climax.victoryRewardDescription: Add A-A5, LAAT/le, TX-225, or WLO-5 to Register with Paragon faction/affiliation.
climax.lossRewardDescription: 1 red attack per equipment removed: hit/crit → +1 SP; surge → non-Paragon +2 XP + Setback. Paragon +2 XP + Greedy.

unitEffects.name: Go Where the Money Is
unitEffects.description: Eyes on the Prize: Agile 1 or Tactical 1.

unitEffects.name: Self-Serving
unitEffects.description: May only use own Courage when checking Panic.

unitEffects.name: Greedy
unitEffects.description: End of Activation: if green tokens or contesting POI, may remove 1 Suppression; else +3 Suppression. Resolves after 2 games.

spendOptions.name: Request Medical Supplies
spendOptions.effectDescription: Remove Setbacks with optional follow-up rolls.

spendOptions.name: Request Reinforcements
spendOptions.effectDescription: Add eligible Heavy Weapon or Personnel upgrade to dossier.

spendOptions.name: Special Training
spendOptions.effectDescription: Unit at max VR: increase max VR by 1 (cap VR5).

spendOptions.name: Supplies and Provisions
spendOptions.effectDescription: Each chosen unit may add 1 non-Heavy/Personnel upgrade.

inventoryItems.name: Request Assistance
inventoryItems.effectDescription: You may include 1 unique non-Commander unit and any upgrades it could equip in your army this game. This unit and its upgrades do not need to be on your Register, but its total points cost still counts toward the total points allowed in your army. This Strategic Asset may be chosen up to 2 times during the Post-Battle Sequence, instead of the normal once. You may not use this Strategic Asset during your Turning Point Mission.

inventoryItems.name: Heroic Intervention
inventoryItems.effectDescription: You may include 1 unique Commander unit in this game. This unit and its upgrades do not need to be on your Register, but its total points cost still counts toward the total points allowed in your army. You may not use this Strategic Asset during your Turning Point Mission.

inventoryItems.name: Requisition Special Equipment
inventoryItems.effectDescription: You may include 1 unique upgrade in your army in this game. This upgrade does not need to be on your Register, but its total points cost still counts toward the total points allowed in your army. This Strategic Asset may be chosen up to 2 times during the Post-Battle Sequence, instead of the normal once. You may not use this Strategic Asset during your Turning Point Mission.

inventoryItems.name: Medevac
inventoryItems.effectDescription: During the Determine Casualties and Setbacks step of the Post-Game Sequence, choose 1 unit in your army that was defeated in this game. The chosen unit does not make a Casualty Check.

inventoryItems.name: Orbital Bombardment
inventoryItems.effectDescription: Once this game, at the start of the Activation Phase, choose 1 POI on the battlefield and roll 5 black attack dice. Each unit within Range 1 of that POI gains 1 Suppression token for each hit or critical result rolled.

inventoryItems.name: Combat Drop
inventoryItems.effectDescription: In this game, choose 1 allied unit at the start of the first Activation Phase. The chosen unit gains Infiltrate this game.

inventoryItems.name: Authorized Extraordinary Use
inventoryItems.effectDescription: In this game, choose 1 allied unit during Army Building. The chosen unit does not count against the maximum number of units of its Rank that can be included in your army this game.

inventoryItems.name: Contingency Plan
inventoryItems.effectDescription: Once this game, at the start of any End Phase, you may choose one of your Agendas that you did not use this game. Your Agenda in play is no longer in play, and the chosen Agenda is now your Agenda in play. At the end of the game, if you did not switch your Agendas that game, do not remove this Strategic Asset from your Register.

cards.description: Ordered units gain Aim; defeats grant XP.
Tokens / Agenda progress grant XP and SP.
Return to hand at end of Command Phase.
